svg.text: Entity Relationship Diagram — Mental Health Support Platform
Primary Key — Unique identifier for each record
Foreign Key — References another table's primary key
Users ─||─ Profiles (1:1) • Users ─|< Appointments (1:N) • Users ─|< ClinicalRecords (1:N) • ClinicalRecords ─|< ClinicalDocuments (1:N)
Users ─|< ChatMessages (1:N) • Users ─|< MoodEntries (1:N) • Users ─|< ChatbotTranscripts (1:N) • Users ─|< Notifications (1:N)
Users ─|< EmergencyLogs (1:N) • Users ─|< AuditLogs (1:N) • Users ─|< ConsentRecords (1:N) • Users ─|< Resources (1:N) • Users ─|< AnalyticsData (1:N)
